action.reasoning: Observation: Remaining time 9 min, 3 iterations left. Weighted ensemble found alpha=1.0, so no improvement over best single model (0.1621). Analysis: Could try zero-shot CLIP classification without training; it may yield competitive macro_f1 and can be executed quickly. Decision: Write predict.py supporting zero-shot mode, write test_zero_shot.py to evaluate zero-shot ViT-L on val set with temperature scaling. If val macro_f1 > 0.16, next iteration will create zero_shot.pt and submit eval. This iteration runs the test; no eval submission.
